title: GUI to IDE Host Message
description: Strict GUI readiness, current read-only/navigation controlled IDE action requests, bounded controlled replacement edit requests, and confirmed edit proposal messages only. Controlled IDE actions are local-only read/context/navigation or explicitly confirmed bounded replacement edit requests and do not grant shell-like actions, tasks, git, arbitrary tools, autonomous file reads, or unbounded writes.

enum: Run the focused GUI application test gate.
Run the focused engine chat test gate.
